name: gitEnglish Hub
prompt_hint: Use a dark theme with background #262424, card backgrounds #383535, accent color #ff6600 (burnt orange), text color #e0ded2, border color #555252. Use Inter font for body text and Raleway for headings. Cards should have neumorphic box shadows (soft light/dark edges on #383535 against #262424). Include the gitEnglish logo image in a footer or corner. All CSS must be inline in a <style> tag — no external CDN links, no Tailwind CDN, no <script> tags. The output must be a complete HTML document that works standalone.
print_css: @media print { body { background: #fff !important; color: #333 !important; } .ge-card { background: #f5f5f5 !important; box-shadow: none !important; border: 1px solid #ddd !important; } .ge-accent { color: #cc5500 !important; } button[id='regenerate'] { display: none !important; } @page { margin: 1.5cm; size: A4; } }
